question_intent: Calculate the total revenue generated from sales of titles published by Algodata Infosystems, considering the applicable royalty rates and discounts.

plan.question_intent: Calculate the total revenue generated from sales of titles published by Algodata Infosystems, considering the applicable royalty rates and discounts.
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.title_id, leaf_1.title, leaf_1.price, leaf_1.qty, leaf_1.royaltyper, leaf_1.discount, leaf_1.royalty, (leaf_1.qty * leaf_1.price * leaf_1.royalty / 100) AS revenue FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, t.price, ta.royaltyper, d.discount, rs.royalty FROM titles AS t JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id JOIN discounts AS d ON s.stor_id = d.stor_id JOIN roysched AS rs ON t.title_id = rs.title_id WHERE (t.pub_id = '1389') AND (s.qty BETWEEN rs.lorange AND rs.hirange)) AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, t.price, ta.royaltyper, d.discount, rs.royalty
join_clauses: JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN discounts AS d ON s.stor_id = d.stor_id
JOIN roysched AS rs ON t.title_id = rs.title_id
blocks.notes: This block retrieves the title details, sales quantity, price, royalty percentage, discount, and royalty rate for titles published by Algodata Infosystems (pub_id = '1389'), where the sales quantity falls within the applicable royalty range.

blocks.name: root
blocks.select_clause: SELECT SUM(leaf_1.qty * leaf_1.price * leaf_1.royalty / 100) AS total_revenue
blocks.notes: This block calculates the total revenue generated from the sales of titles published by Algodata Infosystems, considering the applicable royalty rates and discounts.

FROM titles AS t
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM titles AS t
JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN discounts AS d ON s.stor_id = d.stor_id
JOIN roysched AS rs ON t.title_id = rs.title_id
WHERE (t.pub_id = '1389')
LIMIT 5

FROM titles AS t
JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN discounts AS d ON s.stor_id = d.stor_id
JOIN roysched AS rs ON t.title_id = rs.title_id
WHERE (t.pub_id = '1389') AND (s.qty BETWEEN rs.lorange AND rs.hirange)

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, t.price, ta.royaltyper, d.discount, rs.royalty
FROM titles AS t
JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN discounts AS d ON s.stor_id = d.stor_id
JOIN roysched AS rs ON t.title_id = rs.title_id
WHERE (t.pub_id = '1389') AND (s.qty BETWEEN rs.lorange AND rs.hirange)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.qty * leaf_1.price * leaf_1.royalty / 100) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, t.price, ta.royaltyper, d.discount, rs.royalty
FROM titles AS t
JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN discounts AS d ON s.stor_id = d.stor_id
JOIN roysched AS rs ON t.title_id = rs.title_id
WHERE (t.pub_id = '1389') AND (s.qty BETWEEN rs.lorange AND rs.hirange)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.qty * leaf_1.price * leaf_1.royalty / 100) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT publishers.pub_id, publishers.pub_name, titles.title_id, titles.title, sales.qty, titles.price, roysched.royalty
FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN roysched ON titles.title_id = roysched.title_id
WHERE (publishers.state = 'CA') AND (sales.qty BETWEEN roysched.lorange AND roysched.hirange)) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(royaltyper) AS avg_royalty_percentage
FROM (SELECT authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, publishers.pub_name, publishers.city, publishers.state, titleauthor.royaltyper
FROM authors
JOIN titleauthor ON authors.au_id = titleauthor.au_id
JOIN titles ON titleauthor.title_id = titles.title_id
JOIN publishers ON titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
WHERE (publishers.state = 'CA') AND (titleauthor.royaltyper > 60)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total revenue calculated as the sum of each sale's quantity multiplied by its price and royalty percentage, for titles published by publisher '1389'?
